title: glochidion angulatum
intro: Glochidion angulatum, also known as the angular milkwood or angle milkwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glochidion angulatum include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as being used as a diuretic and expectorant. Herbal preparations of Glochidion angulatum include infusions and decoctions, which are typically made from the leaves or roots of the plant.
